DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF KARIN GREIER'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MULTIPLICITY OF INTERROGATORIES WAS NOT REASONABLE, BUT THEY DID NOT LACK SUFFICIENT JUSTIFICATION SUCH THAT SANCTIONS ARE WARRANTED. DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT PHILIP SODERQUIST'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE AND RESPONSES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED AS TO INTERROGATORIES 9-12 AND 14-15 AND GRANTED AS TO INTERROGATORY 13. INTERROGATORIES 9-12 AND 15 ARE NOT PROPER INTERROGATORIES. INTERROGATORY 14 IS DUPLICATIVE OF INTERROGATORY 13. INTERROGATORY 13 IS PROPER AND SHOULD BE ANSWERED IN FULL. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. NEITHER SIDE HAS EXHIBITED EXEMPLARY BEHAVIOR WITH RESPECT TO THE DISCOVERY REQUESTS AT ISSUE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. IN ADDITION, THE COURT SIGNED PLAINTIFF'S ORDER RE MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES RE HEARING OF 10/07/11. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Oct-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT PHILIP SODERQUIST'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE AND RESPONSES.

APPEARANCES: Russell A. Robinson, Esq. of Law Office of Russell A. Robinson 255-0462 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Denied as to interrogatories 9-12 and 14-15 and granted as to interrogatory 13. Interrogatories 9-12 and 15 are not proper interrogatories. Interrogatory 14 is duplicative of interrogatory 13. Interrogatory 13 is proper and should be answered in full. Sanctions are denied. Neither side has exhibited exemplary behavior with respect to the discovery requests at issue. Order signed in open court. In addition, the Court signed plaintiff's order re motion to compel further responses re hearing of 10/07/11. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One
Off Calendar Oct-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Plaintiff Karin Greier's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories, set one is denied. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Plaintiff's multiplicity of interrogatories was not reasonable, but they did not lack sufficient justification such that sanctions are warranted. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported = (302/HEK)
